subcodes.first_line: O thou who art accepted at the divine threshold! Order is of two kinds: one which conformeth to the natural world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل مقبول درگاه الهی نظام بر دو قسم است نظمی که مطابق عالم طبیعت است
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @one universal law; attractive power of love, @outward and inward meanings
